name: ClawDrill
description: A massive, 90-meter-long drill operated by Red Helldivers to excavate Helium-3 from planetary cores.
mechanics: Operated via complex manual nodule panels. Requires a DC 20 Dexterity check for non-Helldivers to pilot without crashing.

name: GravBoots
description: Advanced anti-gravity footwear primarily used by Golds. Controlled through subtle toe movements.
mechanics: Allows the wearer to hover, fly, and perform high-speed aerial maneuvers. Grants a fly speed of 60 ft.

name: Razor
description: The signature weapon of the Gold Color. Made of a chemical-reactive material that transitions between a flexible whip and a rigid blade.
mechanics: Versatile (sword/whip), Finesse. Whip form has 10 ft reach and can grapple as a bonus action. Illegal for non-Golds.

name: PulseFist
description: A gauntlet-mounted energy weapon capable of firing destructive pulses. Can be set to stun or kill.
mechanics: Ranged weapon. Stun setting requires a DC 15 CON save or target falls unconscious. Kill setting deals 2d10 radiant damage.

name: PulseArmor
description: High-tech, form-fitting combat armor with a built-in PulseShield generator. Deflects kinetic and energy attacks.
mechanics: Base AC 17. The PulseShield absorbs the first 20 points of damage per encounter before needing to recharge. Overheats under sustained fire.

name: Forged Sigil
description: A surgical implant on the back of the hand spoofing BoQC scanners with a false Color identity.
mechanics: Passes standard commercial manifest scans. Automatically fails deep-scans or White Arbiter inquisitions. Discovery is a capital offense.

name: Scocher
description: A standard-issue energy sidearm, often carried by Gray legionaries.
mechanics: Ranged weapon (30/120 ft), 1d8 radiant damage. Common on the black market in the Belt or the Gyre.

name: WhisperCrystal
description: A thumb-sized translucent crystal encoded with a single-use voice message.
mechanics: Plays once at a whisper volume, then dissolves into inert dust leaving no data trail.
